title: Crypto enters Q3 with thinner liquidity but less leverage after Q2 reset: Talos
summary: Bitcoin and Ether open interest fell sharply after $8.35 billion in long liquidations, while ETF outflows, weaker Strategy purchases and declining market depth reduced liquidity.

title: Bitcoin ETFs lose record $4.5B in June, eclipsing Strategy's $1.25B raise
summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs logged a record $4.5 billion in June outflows, pushing year-to-date totals to $5.5 billion, signaling an unprecedented pace of withdrawals.

title: Eni and Mercuria to Form Global Commodities Trading Venture
summary: Italian oil company Eni SpA and commodities merchant Mercuria Energy Group Ltd. signed an agreement to expand their global trading footprint by forming a joint venture.

title: Wayve Files for Share Sale on London Bourse’s New Private Market
summary: Autonomous driving software company Wayve Technologies Ltd. has filed to sell shares on the London Stock Exchange’s new Private Securities Market, the first major company to test the novel system.

title: President Donald Trump Discloses More Than $50 Million in Bitcoin Held in Cold Storage
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

President Donald Trump Discloses More Than $50 Million in Bitcoin Held in Cold Storage
President Donald Trump's 2025 financial disclosure revealed more than $50 million in self-custodied Bitcoin held in cold storage and over $1 billion in crypto-related reported revenue and proceed

title: Anchorage Digital and Binance Launch Off-Exchange Settlement for Institutional Crypto Trading
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Anchorage Digital and Binance Launch Off-Exchange Settlement for Institutional Crypto Trading
Anchorage Digital and Binance launched off-exchange settlement for institutional crypto trading, allowing institutions to trade on Binance while keeping their assets in segregated custody

title: Goliath Ventures CEO Pleads Guilty to $250M Crypto Ponzi Scheme
summary: Christopher Delgado’s "liquidity pool" fraud took in at least $400 million, with the proceeds spent on mansions, Lamborghinis, and Rolexes.

title: Trump Discloses Over $1.2 Billion in Crypto Earnings, $50M in Bitcoin Holdings
summary: The president’s annual financial disclosure report was released on Tuesday.

title: Ripple, Coinbase among top donors in crypto’s $189 million election spending: report
summary: Crypto firms contributed $189 million to the 2026 midterms, with Ripple, Crypto.com and Coinbase leading corporate donations.

title: Nearly 1,700 UK investors sue Binance, founder CZ over alleged unauthorized derivatives sales
summary: Almost 1,700 investors are suing Binance and founder Changpeng Zhao in a London High Court over unauthorized crypto derivatives sale claims.

title: Donald Trump made more than $1bn last year in return to presidency
summary: US president also earned hundreds of thousands of dollars from licensing of Bibles, watches and perfume

title: Five things we learnt from Trump’s financial disclosure
summary: The US president earned more than $1bn from digital currency interests as well as real estate and stock trades
